summary: Complete testing of WELLGUARD SCA rebrand from Type-A. All 13 backend API tests passed. All 6 frontend tabs working correctly. UI correctly implements 2019 enterprise aesthetic with Segoe UI font, #f5f5f5 background, corporate blue #0066cc, no animations.

minor.issue: Returns 'Type-A Platform API' message - backend not rebranded but this is expected per requirements (only frontend rebrand)

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend rebrand complete - WellGuardApp.jsx is the main entry point at /
Old Type-A files (AdminDashboard.jsx, DashboardPage.jsx, landing components) still exist but are NOT used - routing goes directly to WellGuardApp
Backend API message still says 'Type-A Platform API' but this is acceptable as only frontend was rebranded
Trivy CLI not installed in current environment - scans fail with 'No such file or directory: trivy' but API correctly handles this error
Mock data correctly shows 20 oil & gas applications with realistic names (wellhead-telemetry-svc, pipeline-pressure-monitor, etc.)
2019 enterprise aesthetic correctly implemented: Segoe UI font, #f5f5f5 background, corporate blue #0066cc, Bootstrap 4-style tables, no animations
seed_data_creation: Using existing mock data from wellguardData.js with 20 oil & gas apps, 24 CVEs, 26 dependencies
context_for_next_testing_agent: WELLGUARD SCA rebrand complete. All 6 tabs (Dashboard, Scan Results, Dependencies, Licenses, SBOM, Settings) working. Backend APIs functional. Trivy CLI not installed in environment but API handles errors correctly. Old Type-A files exist but are not used.

dashboard_tab.table_sorting: PASS - Click column headers to sort
